chapter_subsections.heading_id: Struktur Biaya Uang Panaik Suku Bugis
chapter_subsections.heading_en: Cost Structure of Bugis Panaik Money

chapter_subsections.heading_id: Uang Panaik berkembang dari pembeda keturunan menjadi symbol penghormatan umum
chapter_subsections.heading_en: Panaik money evolved from a lineage differentiator to a general symbol of respect

chapter_subsections.heading_id: Ada celah: berubah menjadi ajang gengsi dapat menyebabkan keterlambatan nikah atau kawin lari.
chapter_subsections.heading_en: There's a loophole: becoming a matter of prestige can cause marriage delays or elopement.

chapter_subsections.heading_id: Harus selaras syariat: mahar terpisah, uang Panaik sederhana dan wajar
chapter_subsections.heading_en: Must be in line with Sharia: dowry separate, Panaik money simple and reasonable

chapter_subsections.heading_id: Nilai budaya Siri’na Pacce paling tepat jika diisi kejujuran, tanggung jawab, dan kasih sayang, bukan sekedar nominal
chapter_subsections.heading_en: The cultural value of Siri'na Pacce is best filled with honesty, responsibility, and affection, not just a nominal value
